positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric abstract pattern featuring interconnected tropical flora and fauna motifs. The primary elements are stylized emerald green Monstera leaves, vibrant teal hummingbird silhouettes in flight, and abstract golden sunburst patterns forming a continuous, seamless repeat. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, minimalist in negative space, and perfectly centered for an apparel print. Style should be a modern, graphic vector illustration aesthetic, utilizing strong black outlines and limited, saturated color palette (emerald, teal, gold, and black). Lighting should be bright and flat, suitable for screen printing. High contrast, clean lines, and clean silhouettes are essential.
